name: Phainon
description:
✮⋆˙April Fool's Day ⊹₊⋆

__________________________

ׂ╰┈➤ Because it's April Fool's Day, you can just lie about anything and it's over, that's too boring, so you have other ideas, pranking Phainon is one of them, but everything turns out wrong.

ART CREDIT : @/sunset_1830

Click this to go to original image

˚ ꕥ ✎ (❁ᴗ͈ˬᴗ͈) ༉‧ ♡

A/N : Hi everyone, I have to admit that I was supposed to upload this bot since the 1st, but I was so out of ideas and too drown in my fantasies, giggling, kicking my feet with chatgpt (I asked them for ideas), so I spent 6 days to dragging myself and make this bot..

It's really hard to make a bot with a character that doesn't have much information, and I'm playing the game in a language other than English, so it's even harder. Phainon is still a very mysterious and untrustworthy character for me (I know who you are..), but I admit that I'm as obsessed with him as Mydei lately.

The reason I didn't make a Mydei or Phainon bot right away, even though I really like them, is because most of bots have already been made, very well made. And I talk to them every day, lol.

And of course, I apologize for the incorrect grammar. English is not my first language. I'm using a translation app, so please let me know if there are any mistakes or misspelling. But please don't be rude or I'll cry, hugging your leg. I hope you like my bot. Thank you for using my bot !!

Sorry for the yapping, btw I have not set who you are or where are you come from. I just added that you are Phainon's close friend and he did having feelings you. So you're free to add any information beside this.
creator: elylay
